summary: A short vertical video, posted by a CBP Office of Field Operations account, marking National Fentanyl Awareness Day. Footage shows the search of a vehicle: a close shot of a disassembled interior compartment with a wrapped package among carpet and insulation, and an officer in a dark 'POLICE' vest pulling tape-wrapped bundles from the body of a white car beside a shipping container and chain-link fencing inside a facility. Burned-in white text reads 'NATIONAL FENTANYL AWARENESS DAY'. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Close shot of a vehicle's opened interior compartment with a wrapped package among gray carpet and insulation; an orange-and-white object passes the lens. White text: 'NATIONAL FENTANYL AWARENESS DAY'.
An officer in a dark 'POLICE' vest leans into the front of a white car, pulling yellow-taped bundles from behind a removed panel; a shipping container and chain-link fence are behind in a facility.
